blocks.value:
flowchart TD
  A[Authenticate] --> R[Resolve resource]
  R --> M[Membership]
  M --> P[Role/permission]
  P --> B[Ban/restriction]
  B --> S[Policy]
  S --> V[Runtime validation]
  V --> L[Limits]
  L --> T[Transaction/audit/scoped realtime]
  A -. failure .-> D[Stable safe error]
  P -. failure .-> D
  V -. failure .-> D

rows: Server role checks + owner invariant + audit

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  D[Detect] --> T[Triage/evidence]
  T --> C[Contain]
  C --> F[Fix root cause]
  F --> R[Restore/verify]
  R --> P[Post-incident tests/docs]
